allow: Bash(rm -f src/finance_app/api/net_worth.py src/finance_app/api/wealth_assets.py src/finance_app/api/reports_pkg/wealth.py src/finance_app/models/wealth_asset.py src/finance_app/templates/wealth.html src/finance_app/services/wealth/helpers.py src/finance_app/services/wealth/net_worth_service.py src/finance_app/services/wealth/real_estate_service.py src/finance_app/services/wealth/__init__.py)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
from finance_app.database import get_session_factory, default_database_name, init_db
from finance_app.models.patrimonio_debt import PatrimonioDebt
init_db\(\)
db = get_session_factory\(default_database_name\(\)\)\(\)
debts = db.query\(PatrimonioDebt\).all\(\)
for d in debts:
    print\(f'{d.nombre}: tipo={d.tipo}, monto={d.monto_original}, tasa={d.tasa_anual}, plazo={d.plazo_meses}, legacy_id={d.legacy_debt_id}, tipo_amort={d.tipo_amortizacion}'\)
db.close\(\)
")
